transcript:
CALLER: Hello, this is regarding a bill I received. I think I was double-charged for a blood test.
AGENT: I apologise for that. Let me take a look. Your name and invoice number?
CALLER: Chandra Bose. Invoice SNC-2024-10987.
AGENT: Pulling it up... I can see two entries for CBC test. That does look like a duplicate. I'm flagging this for our billing team immediately.
CALLER: Good. How long will the refund take?
AGENT: Once the billing team confirms the error — which should be by tomorrow — the refund will be processed within 3-5 business days to your original payment method. You'll receive a message when it's initiated.
CALLER: Alright, as long as it gets sorted.
AGENT: We sincerely apologise for the inconvenience, Mr. Bose. It will be corrected.
